debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Pop.ArchReq
valid : Pop.ValidScopes
t₁ t₂ : Pop.ThreadId
scope : List Pop.ThreadId
⊢ scope ∈ Pop.ValidScopes.scopes valid

failed_attempts:
by
       have h := valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂
       simpa [scope] using h
by simpa using (ListTree.meet_mem valid.scopes t₁ t₂)
by simpa using (ListTree.meet_mem valid.scopes t₁ t₂ ▸ rfl)

by
       have h := valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂
       simpa [scope] using h

by
      simpa using (ListTree.meet_mem (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) (t := valid.scopes) rfl)

by
      have h : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
        simpa [ListTree.meet] using (show Option.isSome (valid.scopes.meet t₁ t₂) from by simp)
      simpa [(· ∈ ·), Membership.mem] using h
by simpa using valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂

by
      have h := valid.scopes.meet_mem t₁ t₂
      simpa using h

by
       simpa using (valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂ scope rfl)

by
      have hmem : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
        simpa using (valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂ scope).1 rfl
      simpa [Membership.mem] using hmem
by simpa using (ListTree.meet_mem_scopes (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) rfl)

by
       have h := valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂
       simpa [h]

by
      have h : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
        simpa [ListTree.elem] using (Option.isSome_iff_exists.mp rfl).choose_spec
      exact h

by
        have h := ListTree.meet_spec (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) (T := valid.scopes) (scope := scope)
        simpa [ListTree.elem] using h
by simpa using (by assumption)
by simpa using (valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂ ▸ rfl)
by simpa using (valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂ ▸ by rfl)

by
      simpa using (valid.scopes.meet_mem_scopes t₁ t₂ (by simp))

by
      have h : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
        simpa [ListTree.elem] using (Option.mem_get?.mp (by
          simpa using (ListTree.meet_spec (scopes := valid.scopes) t₁ t₂) ▸ rfl))
      simpa using h

by
      have : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
        simpa [ListTree.meet] using (And.left (by
          simpa [Option.bind_eq_bind, Option.map_eq_map, Option.mem_def] : True))
      exact this

by
      have h := valid.scopes.meet_spec t₁ t₂
      simpa [scope] using h

by
       have h : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
         simpa [ListTree.meet] using (show True from trivial)
       simpa [Membership.mem] using h
by simpa using (valid.scopes.meet_isNode (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) scope rfl)

by
      have hmem : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
        simpa using (ListTree.meet_mem (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) (tree := valid.scopes) (h := rfl))
      simpa [Membership.mem, ListTree.Mem] using hmem
by simpa using (by cases valid; simp [ListTree.meet] : scope ∈ ValidScopes.scopes { system_scope := system_scope, scopes := scopes
by simpa using (ListTree.meet_spec (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) (scopes := valid.scopes))

by
      simpa [ListTree.meet] using (Option.get?_mem_toList (t := valid.scopes) (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) (by simp) )

by
       simpa using (valid.scopes.meet_mem t₁ t₂ ▸ (by simp))

by
       have : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
         simpa [ListTree.meet] using Option.get?_mem (t := valid.scopes.meet t₁ t₂) (by simp)
       simpa [Membership.mem] using this
by simpa using (ListTree.meet_elem (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) (tree := valid.scopes) (scope := scope))

by
       simpa [ListTree.meet] using (Option.isSome_iff_exists.1 rfl).choose_spec

by
      have h : valid.scopes.elem scope := by
        simpa using (ListTree.meet_spec (t₁ := t₁) (t₂ := t₂) (h := rfl))
